plan_history.intent_description: R2 is not advertising the 172.16.0.0/24 LAN into OSPF, preventing R1 and upstream routers from reaching 172.16.0.11; restore OSPF advertisement so traffic to 172.16.0.0/24 is routable.
plan_history.problem: R2 OSPF process-1 lacks a network statement for 172.16.0.0/24 (interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0 is 172.16.0.1/24), so the prefix is not advertised and R1 has no route to 172.16.0.11.
plan_history.fix_summary: Add 172.16.0.0/24 to R2 OSPF process-1 network statements (advertise via GigabitEthernet0/0/0 into the correct area) so upstream routers receive the route.

remaining_issues: R2 OSPF on GigabitEthernet0/0/0 still shows interface_state "Waiting" (get_ospf for router2) — OSPF adjacency/advertisement for the LAN may not be fully established despite connectivity
Intermittent packet loss observed (1/5 ICMP probes lost); investigate underlying cause if unreliable connectivity is a concern
